title: Biomancy
description: Biopunk inspired tech-magic mod that has a fleshy art theme....
body:
# Biomancy

## Contributors **RhinoW**, The Shroome, Shorepion, Kitteh6660, ZeoMaddox, ItsLumine, RuskieThe3rd, M4rc3ll0 Many thanks to the members of my discord server for their feedback and ideas. ## Translators SlimeSB, Quarkrus, Mexwell12, cabaneter ## Sponsors **PonyPon**, **Tapeworm Tim**, **Spedic**, **Adam**, June, Toom, da.shyguy, Zeca, pixel_mode ## General Info ### No Guide Book The mod will not provide a guide book and most of its progression is described through **advancements** and **tooltips**. Please note that at the moment the tooltips & advancements can be too obscure or badly written. This issue will be resolved during the development of the mod. If you need help to get started you can watch [this video](https://youtu.be/zXK__qi48kk). **I recommended the use of JEI to look up recipes.** ### Mod Integrations/Compatibility - JEI - Enchantment Descriptions - Alex's Mobs - Pehkui - Flesh Door & Iris Door work on Create contraptions/trains - Digester accepts any food - Raw Meat from Farmer's Delight ### Addons - [BioFactory](https://modrinth.com/mod/biofactory) - [Biomantic Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/bio-delight) - [Biobutcher's Delight](https://modrinth.com/datapack/biobutchers-delight)   ## FAQ ### Will you port to 1.21? soon(tm) ### Will you port to older versions of minecraft? no ### What about a Fabric Version? I will create a fabric version eventually. # Bugs & Crashes Please report any issues to the Biomancy Issue Tracker on GitHub or the bug-and-crashes channel on Discord. # Videos
